a.js(5,1): error TS2309: An export assignment cannot be used in a module with other exported elements.


==== b.js (0 errors) ====
    const a = require("./a");
    const c1 = a.a;
    const c2 = a.b;
    /** @type {a.Foo} */
    let v1 = { x: "test" };
    
==== a.js (1 errors) ====
    /**
     * @typedef {{x: string}} Foo
     */
    export const x = 1; // Causes error
    module.exports = { a: 1, b: "hello" };
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2309: An export assignment cannot be used in a module with other exported elements.
